name: vectros
description: Typed record store + hybrid search over MCP: deterministic lookups + semantic memory, per-customer.
long_description:
Vectros is a typed, multi-tenant record store unified with hybrid search and citation-grounded RAG — deterministic lookups and enumeration AND semantic search over one isolated, per-customer index of records and documents, so an agent gets memory that's precise, not just fuzzy recall. It's reached agent-natively over MCP and human-natively through the Vectros app + SDKs. This extension connects Claude Desktop to your Vectros tenant through 21 data-plane tools (typed records, documents, hybrid search, and citation-grounded RAG). There are no web-search or scraping tools, by design.

You provide a least-privilege scoped key (ssk_...). Don't have one yet? Run `npx -y @vectros-ai/cli bootstrap` — it mints a scoped key and an AccessProfile for you (a one-time developer-portal sign-in is required).

api_key.title: Vectros API key
api_key.description: Your scoped key (ssk_...). Don't have one? Run `npx -y @vectros-ai/cli bootstrap` to mint a least-privilege key — it requires a one-time developer-portal sign-in (a real human step; there is no unattended provisioning).

tools.name: hybrid_search
tools.description: Hybrid BM25 + dense search across the tenant's indexed records and documents.

tools.name: rag_ask
tools.description: Ask a question grounded against the indexed corpus (retrieval-augmented generation).

tools.name: document_ask
tools.description: Ask a question grounded against a single document.

tools.name: list_schemas
tools.description: List the record-schema catalog the credential can see.

tools.name: record_query
tools.description: Query records by lookup field or list mode.

tools.name: record_get
tools.description: Fetch one record by id, including its full payload.

tools.name: record_create
tools.description: Create a record of a given type; idempotent by externalId.

tools.name: record_update
tools.description: Patch a record's payload with optimistic concurrency.

tools.name: record_delete
tools.description: Delete a record by id (leaves a tombstone).

tools.name: document_ingest
tools.description: Create a document from inline text or a jailed local file (stdio only).

tools.name: document_query
tools.description: Query documents by lookup field or list mode.

tools.name: document_get
tools.description: Fetch a document by id (metadata, optional text, optional download URL).

tools.name: document_update
tools.description: Patch a document's metadata / typed payload.

tools.name: document_delete
tools.description: Delete a document by id and its indexed content.

tools.name: folder_query
tools.description: Get a folder by id, or list folders for tree navigation.

tools.name: folder_create
tools.description: Create a folder.

tools.name: folder_update
tools.description: Update a folder's name / description / ownership.

tools.name: folder_delete
tools.description: Delete a folder.

tools.name: current_identity
tools.description: Describe the credential: tenant, environment, principal, scope.

tools.name: lookup_principal
tools.description: Resolve a user / org / client by your own externalId or a schema lookup field.

tools.name: version_history
tools.description: Read the audit/version trail for one record or document.
